name: @formai/client
description: Formai frontend client SDK - core UI component library

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --external react --external react-dom --external antd --external @ant-design/icons --external dayjs --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --watch --external react --external react-dom --external antd --external @ant-design/icons --external dayjs --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
